headline: What Verisk Analytics (VRSK)'s Written-Consent Fight Amid AI Push and Cost Concerns Means For Shareholders
summary: On April 3, 2026, Verisk Analytics filed its definitive proxy statement opposing shareholder activist John Chevedden’s proposal to allow investors to act by written consent, following a recent universal shelf registration covering common and preferred stock, debt securities, rights, warrants and units. This governance clash arrives as Verisk highlights subscription-driven revenue stability and new AI-based analytics offerings, even while investors question rising operating costs and uneven...
